meaning: n.(性质等的)内在,固有,天赋,[哲]内在性,固有性(指属性对于主体的关系)
examples: High precision is achieved due to the inherence of the floating-point algorithm.
The inherence of life is a kind of movement deviating the gravitation and flying freely.
In contrast to the long black-white experience in the United States, originating in slavery, there is no long history to, or historical inherence of, anti-Muslim bigotry.
